prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the **CZCA 1.4 TSI (EA211)** engine with **IS38 turbocharger upgrade** (GTX2867R Gen II, 23psi peak boost), paired with a **Forge Motorsport Motorsport intercooler (FMIC) kit** (core dimensions: 600x300x65mm) and **034 Motorsport billet aluminum intake manifold** (optimized for high-RPM flow)

Full **Miltek Sport 3-inch turbo-back exhaust system** (304 stainless steel, non-resonated, 100-cell catalytic converter) with **Akrapovič downpipe (76mm diameter, 1.5mm wall thickness)** and **Vibrant 1799 ultra-quiet muffler** (dual 3.5-inch outlets, titanium internals)

KW Suspensions **Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, 400lb/in front springs, 500lb/in rear springs)** with **034 Motorsport Motorsport subframe collars** and **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (22mm, 3-position)** for chassis stiffening, paired with **H&R lowering springs (25mm front, 20mm rear)** for pre-load optimization
estetica: **Rieger Tuning RS-style front bumper** (carbon fiber, integrated tow hooks, 3D-printed air curtain ducts) with **VW Racing GTI-style side skirts** (polyurethane, OEM+ fitment) and **Maxton Design rear diffuser** (carbon fiber, 2x 90mm exhaust cutouts, integrated brake cooling ducts)

**BBS LM 17x8 ET40 wheels** (9J rear, 5x100 PCD, 50mm center bore) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (215/40/17 front, 225/40/17 rear)** with **H&R Trak+ wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear)** for aggressive flush fitment, finished with **OZ Racing Ultraleggera center caps**

**OMP Steering Wheel (350mm, suede, MOMO quick-release hub)** with **Sparco 6-point harness (Schroth Profi II 6-point, FIA-approved)** and **Recaro Sportster CS seats (carbon fiber backs, 30mm side bolster adjustment)** in **Nappa leather with Alcantara inserts (VW Racing stitching pattern)**
